backend/main.mo: Main actor defining the ICP backend with user profile management and mod storage, exposing query/update methods for saving and retrieving profiles and mods with basic access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (with ModIdea map) into the new actor state (with a List-based mods store), preserving user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (mod submission form, gallery display, search, and visual theme) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title and mounting the root div with the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders ModGalleryPage as the sole top-level view.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Reusable login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication, with loading state, query cache clearing on logout, and Turkish UI labels.
frontend/src/features/modGallery/compone: Card component that displays a single mod's name, category badge, description, feature badges, author, and formatted creation date.
Main gallery page component combining a sticky header, banner image, search bar, submission form, loading skeletons, and a filtered mod list.
Responsive grid component rendering a list of ModCards with empty-state messages for no mods or no search results.
Search input component with a leading search icon, wired to parent state for real-time filtering of the mod list.
A React form component for submitting new mods, with fields for name, author, description, features, and category, including validation and success feedback.
frontend/src/features/modGallery/queries: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching all mods (sorted newest-first) and saving a new mod via the backend actor.
frontend/src/features/modGallery/utils/d: Utility function that converts a backend bigint nanosecond timestamp to a human-readable locale date string.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor using TanStack Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and control functions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark game-inspired themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom fonts, shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Mod Gallery project including existing features, new feature requests, architectural notes, and image requirements. Defines the app as a public mod submission and browsing platform with search functionality and a dark game-inspired theme.
